overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit dystopian city. The player moves along wet streets reflecting colorful advertisements, passing under elevated highways and through intersections with moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

events.description: passing a parked military truck on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the overpass, approaching a security barrier ahead

entered.detail: metal and concrete bench on the sidewalk near the starting position
large armored military vehicle parked on the street to the left
massive concrete overpass structure spanning overhead with support columns
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying pink and red graphics
yellow and black striped security gate with warning signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet concrete sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway. A military truck is parked on the adjacent street while neon billboards glow in the distance. The player walks forward toward a security checkpoint with a 'NO ENTRY' barrier.

scene_state.functional_zone: security checkpoint area transitioning to main street

events.description: passing through the NO ENTRY barrier into the restricted area beyond
turning right to follow the street path alongside the guard booth

agents.ego_description: passing the security barrier and turning right to follow the road alignment

notable_agents.action: security guard standing near the booth watching the area

entered.detail: dark security booth structure with shuttered windows next to the barrier
massive illuminated billboard displaying two human figures in yellow light
tall commercial building with prominent red neon signage reading 'Fuyutsuki'

segments.scene_description: The player passes through the security checkpoint and turns right, leaving the benches and truck behind. A small guard booth sits to the right as the view opens toward a massive yellow billboard and the distant Fuyutsuki building with its distinctive red neon sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial corridor under elevated highway with dense signage

events.description: approaching denser pedestrian traffic near the Fuyutsuki building intersection

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk passing other pedestrians heading in the same direction

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright pink pants walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall pole with bright linear LED lighting illuminating the sidewalk
yellow and white painted stripes on the road indicating pedestrian crossing

segments.scene_description: Walking along the covered commercial corridor, the player passes other pedestrians while the massive yellow billboard shifts to the left. The Fuyutsuki building looms larger on the right as the player approaches the intersection with visible crosswalk markings.

events.description: exiting the covered overpass area into the open intersection beneath the Fuyutsuki building
crossing the street at the crosswalk while vehicles wait at the intersection

agents.ego_description: stepping onto the crosswalk and traversing the intersection while avoiding vehicles

notable_agents.action: red sports car waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: sleek red sports vehicle with illuminated headlights waiting at the traffic light
bright red neon sign with fist logo reading 'BD SHACK' on building facade

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from under the overpass into the open intersection dominated by the Fuyutsuki building's red neon signage. Crossing the street alongside other pedestrians, a red sports car waits at the light while the BD SHACK sign becomes visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with storefronts and neon signage

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past various storefronts and illuminated signs

entered.detail: row of commercial buildings with various illuminated signs and entrances

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the player continues along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway. The BD SHACK neon sign grows more prominent on the left while various storefronts line the right side of the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered industrial underpass into a wide, neon-saturated commercial district. It begins on a wet concrete sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway, moving past a parked military truck toward a security checkpoint marked by a no entry barrier. As the camera passes through the checkpoint and turns right, the oppressive concrete of the highway gives way to an open view of a massive yellow billboard and the distant, red-lit Fuyutsuki building. The scene then shifts into a covered commercial corridor, gliding past pedestrians as the yellow billboard recedes to the left. Finally, the Fuyutsuki building looms larger on the right as the camera approaches a city intersection marked by bright crosswalks.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the shadow of an overpass into a vibrant, neon-lit city intersection and back beneath an elevated highway. It begins as the camera emerges from the underpass into an open crossing dominated by the red glow of the Fuyutsuki building's signage. As the player moves across the street alongside pedestrians and a waiting red sports car, the BD SHACK sign gradually comes into view on the left. The scene then shifts as the camera completes the crossing and continues along the sidewalk, where the BD SHACK neon becomes more prominent against a backdrop of various storefronts lining the right. Finally, the perspective moves deeper into the urban corridor, returning to the sheltered path beneath the elevated highway.
